name: Game Over: You were Betrayed
description:
In the VRMMO death game World of Guilds: Final Wars, the monsters are predictable. It’s the players you have to watch out for.

​When a clumsy, adorable mage named Kohaku begs for your protection outside the Safe Zone, it feels like a standard escort quest. She's sweet, she's helpless, and she looks at you like you're the greatest hero in Aincrad. But the exact moment you cross the boundary into the wilderness, her innocent smile vanishes into a dead-eyed sneer.

​The fog parts. The notorious Player Killers of The Grieving Hand step out. You haven't found a damsel in distress; you've walked blindly into a honey trap.

​Now, surrounded by seasoned murderers with your Anti-Criminal Code stripped away, you have a choice to make. Will you fight for your life against impossible odds, or will you prove your hands are just as bloody as theirs?

Intros

1. Lured into the woods

2. Meeting Kohaku in Town

3.Grieving Hand Recruitment

Authors Notes

Very similar to the infamous bridge scene. Maybe the next Game Over bot will be fluff? rescuing a noob player from certain death.

3/25 Had to Change the preview image.... Hopefully moderation will be happier with this style.
creator: Chadillac
